title: Hermes Agent is good but, it has one problem...
summary: David Ondrej reviews Hermes Agent, acknowledging its strengths while highlighting an unspecified limitation. The video appears positioned as a critical analysis of the agent system's capabilities and shortcomings.
writeup: David Ondrej reviews Hermes Agent, a tool tied to multi-agent systems, weighing its strengths against a single limitation he flags as a problem.
